name: Qdrant
description: High-performance open-source vector database. Supports dense, sparse, and multi-vector search. On-premise or cloud. Rust-built for production-scale RAG pipelines.

skills.name: Index and query dense vectors with HNSW for high-recall approximate search
skills.description: Index and query dense vectors with HNSW for high-recall approximate search

skills.name: Support sparse vectors for keyword-style retrieval alongside semantic dense search
skills.description: Support sparse vectors for keyword-style retrieval alongside semantic dense search

skills.name: Apply complex payload filters to narrow search results without re-ranking overhead
skills.description: Apply complex payload filters to narrow search results without re-ranking overhead

skills.name: Use named multi-vector collections for image, text, and code embedding co-search
skills.description: Use named multi-vector collections for image, text, and code embedding co-search

skills.name: Quantize vectors to reduce memory footprint by up to 32x with minimal recall loss
skills.description: Quantize vectors to reduce memory footprint by up to 32x with minimal recall loss
